title: Section 4
content: In the Delimitation of Parliamentary and Assembly Constituencies Order, 1956,— (a) in the First Schedule, in the entry in column 3 against serial No. 37, the words "Naga Hills", shall be omitted; and (b) in the Second Schedule, in the Part relating to Assam, the heading "Naga Hills District" and all entries against serial Nos. 16, 17 and 18 shall be omitted.
